name: oscar-document-reader-mcp
description: Document-navigation MCP for Oscar GC's Lavern partners. Structural lift from github.com/AnttiHero/lavern (Apache-2.0; commit 7c2efe61). Five read-only tools: list_documents, read_document_section, search_document, get_defined_terms, get_document_tables. Sprint 22 ships with two hardcoded sample parsed documents; a future sprint will wire to a real parser.
author: s-arturko
